title.en: Swissmedic FSCA for B. Braun Infusomat Space P Bedside Infusion Pump (Model 8713070)
title.zh: 瑞士药监局关于B. Braun Infusomat Space P输液泵（型号8713070）的现场安全纠正措施

summary.en: Swissmedic has issued a Field Safety Corrective Action (FSCA) for the Infusomat Space P single-channel bedside infusion pump (model 8713070) manufactured by B. Braun Melsungen AG. The specific safety issue prompting this corrective action is not detailed in the public notice. Healthcare facilities using this device should immediately check their inventory for the affected model and follow the manufacturer's instructions distributed via the FSCA notification.
summary.zh: 瑞士药监局发布了针对B. Braun Melsungen AG生产的Infusomat Space P单通道床旁输液泵（型号8713070）的现场安全纠正措施（FSCA）。公告中未说明导致该纠正措施的具体安全问题。使用该设备的医疗机构应立即检查库存中是否有受影响型号，并遵循制造商随FSCA通知发布的处理要求。

title.en: Swissmedic FSCA for Olympus Single-Use Distal Cover MAJ-2315 (Lot N6192000)
title.zh: 瑞士Swissmedic针对奥林巴斯一次性远端保护罩MAJ-2315发布FSCA

summary.en: Swissmedic issued a Field Safety Corrective Action for the Olympus single-use endoscope patient protection cap, model MAJ-2315, lot N6192000. The specific reason for the corrective action was not disclosed in the notice. Affected healthcare providers should identify and quarantine the product, and follow Olympus' instructions for return or disposal.
summary.zh: 瑞士药品管理局针对奥林巴斯一次性内镜患者保护罩（型号MAJ-2315，批次N6192000）发布了现场安全纠正措施。公告未披露具体原因。相关医疗机构应排查受影响产品，隔离并按照奥林巴斯指示进行退货或废弃处理。

title.en: Swissmedic FSCA: SY-LAB IceCube Freezers Field Safety Corrective Action
title.zh: 瑞士Swissmedic发布SY-LAB冰立方冷冻柜现场安全纠正措施

summary.en: Swissmedic issued a Field Safety Corrective Action (FSCA) for SY-LAB IceCube linear rate freezers. Affected models include IceCube 11XS MED, 14S MED, 14M MED, 17M MED, 17L MED, and non-MED variants 11XS, 14S, 14M, 17M, 17L. The reason for the corrective action was not specified in the notice. Users should follow manufacturer instructions for the corrective action.
summary.zh: 瑞士药品监督管理局(Swissmedic)发布针对SY-LAB公司冰立方(IceCube)线性速率冷冻柜的现场安全纠正措施(FSCA)。受影响型号包括IceCube 11XS MED、14S MED、14M MED、17M MED、17L MED及非医用型号11XS、14S、14M、17M、17L。通知中未说明具体原因，用户应按照制造商指示执行纠正措施。

title.en: Swissmedic FSCA: DH Healthcare GmbH ORBIS Medication 3.x Field Safety Corrective Action
title.zh: ORBIS Medication 3.x 现场安全纠正措施 – DH Healthcare GmbH

summary.en: Swissmedic issued a Field Safety Corrective Action for ORBIS Medication version 3.x by DH Healthcare GmbH, categorized under general medicine instruments. No specific reason or model details were provided in the notice. Users of this medication software should verify if their installation is impacted and follow the manufacturer's corrective instructions.
summary.zh: 瑞士医药管理局发布了对DH Healthcare GmbH的ORBIS Medication 3.x软件的现场安全纠正措施，产品属于普通医疗器械类别。通知未说明具体原因或型号。该用药软件的用户应核查其安装版本是否受影响，并遵循制造商的纠正指导。

title.en: Therakos CELLEX Photopheresis System (CLXECP, CLXSP-I) Field Safety Corrective Action
title.zh: Therakos CELLEX光分离系统（CLXECP、CLXSP-I）现场安全纠正措施

summary.en: Swissmedic published a Field Safety Corrective Action (FSCA) for the Therakos CELLEX Photopheresis System, models CLXECP and CLXSP-I, from Therakos Development Limited. The notice does not specify the reason for the corrective action. Affected users should consult the official FSCA for required actions.
summary.zh: 瑞士Swissmedic发布Therakos Development Limited的Therakos CELLEX光分离系统（型号CLXECP、CLXSP-I）现场安全纠正措施（FSCA）。通知未指明具体原因，受影响用户需查阅官方FSCA并采取必要措施。

title.en: Swissmedic FSCA: Boston Scientific Radial Jaw 4 Biopsy Forceps
title.zh: Swissmedic FSCA：波士顿科学 Radial Jaw 4 活检钳

summary.en: The Swissmedic has issued a Field Safety Corrective Action (FSCA) for the Radial Jaw 4 single-use flexible endoscopic biopsy forceps manufactured by Boston Scientific Corporation. Affected models are identified in the Field Safety Notice (FSN). Healthcare professionals should immediately review the FSN and implement the manufacturer's recommended actions, which may include quarantine and return of affected devices.
summary.zh: 瑞士药品监管局（Swissmedic）已针对波士顿科学公司生产的 Radial Jaw 4 一次性柔性内窥镜活检钳发布现场安全整改措施（FSCA）。受影响型号详见现场安全通知（FSN），相关医疗卫生专业人员应立即查阅该通知，并执行制造商建议的措施，可能包括隔离与退回受影响产品。

title.en: Swissmedic FSCA: Medline Industries LP MEDSTOP Stopcock Safety Alert
title.zh: 瑞士药品管理局发布Medline MEDSTOP三通阀现场安全纠正措施

summary.en: Swissmedic has issued a Field Safety Corrective Action (FSCA) for the MEDSTOP stopcock manufactured by Medline Industries LP. The reason for the corrective action is not specified in the alert summary; affected models are referenced in the manufacturer’s Field Safety Notice (FSN). Users should consult the full FSN for detailed affected model information and implement the recommended actions immediately.
summary.zh: 瑞士药品管理局发布了对Medline Industries LP公司MEDSTOP三通阀的现场安全纠正措施(FSCA)。警报摘要未明确说明纠正原因，受影响型号详见制造商现场安全通知(FSN)。用户应查阅完整FSN获取具体型号信息，并立即执行建议措施。

title.en: MiniMed Go App (MMT-8600/8601) Field Safety Corrective Action – Medtronic MINIMED
title.zh: Medtronic MINIMED MiniMed Go应用(MMT-8600/8601)现场安全纠正行动

summary.en: Swissmedic published a Field Safety Corrective Action (FSCA) for the Medtronic MiniMed Go App, covering iOS version MMT-8600 and Android version MMT-8601, used in conjunction with various diabetes monitoring instruments. The notice does not specify the exact reason for the correction. Affected users should immediately review the manufacturer's instructions and follow the recommended corrective measures to ensure safe device operation.
summary.zh: 瑞士医药监管局发布针对美敦力MiniMed Go移动应用的现场安全纠正行动，涉及iOS版MMT-8600和安卓版MMT-8601，该应用配合多种糖尿病监测设备使用。通知未详述纠正的具体原因。受影响用户应立即查阅制造商说明并执行推荐纠正措施，以确保设备安全运行。

title.en: FARADRIVE Steerable Sheath by Boston Scientific: FSCA for Language Addition to Labeling
title.zh: Boston Scientific 的 FARADRIVE 可调弯鞘管：因标签新增语言发布 FSCA

summary.en: This field safety corrective action (FSCA) from Swissmedic concerns the FARADRIVE Steerable Sheath, a single-use vascular guide-catheter manufactured by Boston Scientific. The reason is the addition of new language to the product labeling. Affected models are listed in the Field Safety Notice; no specific lot numbers are provided in the public summary. Users should ensure the updated labeling is implemented in accordance with the manufacturer's instructions.
summary.zh: 瑞士 Swissmedic 发布的本次现场安全纠正措施 (FSCA) 涉及 Boston Scientific 生产的一次性血管导引导管 FARADRIVE 可调弯鞘管。原因是产品标签增加了新语言。受影响型号详见现场安全通知，公开摘要未提供具体批号。用户应根据制造商说明确保更新后的标签得以执行。

title.en: Updated Field Safety Notice for Sphere-9 Catheter (Model AFR-00001) from Medtronic/BIOTRONIK
title.zh: Medtronic/BIOTRONIK的Sphere-9导管（型号AFR-00001）现场安全通告更新

summary.en: Swissmedic has published an updated Field Safety Corrective Action for the Sphere-9 Catheter, a cardiac tissue ablation device, due to a new version of the Field Safety Notice (FSN). The affected model is AFR-00001, with manufacturers Medtronic, Inc. and BIOTRONIK SE & Co. KG. Healthcare professionals should immediately review the revised FSN for any modified instructions or risk mitigation measures regarding this device.
summary.zh: 瑞士药品监督管理局（Swissmedic）发布了对Sphere-9心脏组织消融导管的现场安全纠正措施更新，原因是发布了新版现场安全通告（FSN）。受影响型号为AFR-00001，涉及制造商Medtronic, Inc.和BIOTRONIK SE & Co. KG。医务人员应立即查阅修订后的FSN，了解针对该设备的任何更新说明或风险缓解措施。
